canvas_behavior.browser_shell: review shell scales fixed stage uniformly to fit viewport

deterministic_transform.reason: bridge tower and long-span story space should not be covered by the fixed right rail

caption_context.displayed_caption_source: script-locked WebVTT cue text shifted by Challenger-style music-only intro offset

sections.label: OPENING COLLAPSE
sections.title: The Bridge Was Already Moving
sections.summary: A collapse that began as ordinary motion turned into a feedback problem.

sections.label: REDESIGN TRADEOFF
sections.title: The Redesign Removed Stiffness
sections.summary: The bridge became slender, elegant, cheaper, and more flexible.

sections.label: NORMALIZED MOTION
sections.title: Galloping Became Normal
sections.summary: Drivers watched the roadway rise and fall until motion became part of the bridge identity.

sections.label: FAILURE CONDITIONS
sections.title: Five Conditions Before The Cable
sections.summary: The failure chain was already being assembled before the bridge opened.

sections.label: AERODYNAMIC FEEDBACK
sections.title: The Air Fed The Twist
sections.summary: Torsion changed the airflow, and the airflow added energy back into torsion.

sections.label: AFTER THE COLLAPSE
sections.title: The Profession Changed
sections.summary: The bridge fell, and bridge engineering changed its questions.

sections.label: MODEL BOUNDARY
sections.title: The Model Had An Edge
sections.summary: The equations were not useless. They were incomplete outside their domain.

sections.label: LESSON
sections.title: How Engineering Learns
sections.summary: Engineering learns by finding the edge of a model and rebuilding around it.
